title: MuslinZ 6pk Baby Muslin Squares Burp Cloths, Muslins for Baby, 100% Pure Soft Cotton 70x70cm (Yellow)
features: 100% Pure cotton - Ultra absorbent, hardwearing, versatile and wonderfully soft for your baby’s delicate skin.
Machine washable at 40c, quick drying, breathable and softer with every wash.
Multi-use. Burp Cloth, Cover up when feeding, Dribble catcher, Bib, Changing mat cover, Reusable newborn nappy, general mopping up cloth - A Baby Essential item.
UK brand - Designed in Oxfordshire - Ethically made to meet the highest quality standards, to Oeko-Tex standard 100 in ISO and OKEO TEX certified factory. Support UK businesses and buy from us.
description: Product Description Designed in the UK At MuslinZ we found that the muslin squares available were lacking in quality so we decided to design our own. Our muslin's are well known for good quality in the UK and worldwide. Our Classic Muslin Square Essential for all parents and their babies. MuslinZ muslin squares are designed with quality in mind which makes them perfect to use and look great wash after wash. The many features of the MuslinZ muslin are: Machine Washable at 40c - Wash before use Extremely Soft - the more you wash them the softer they get Maintains Shape and Texture - due to the quality fabric Fine Weave - for excellent absorbency and so they are not see through for using as a cover up when feeding 70x70 cm Sizing - a great size for so many uses MuslinZ 6 Pack Multi Purpose Muslin Squares Our classic 100% cotton muslins can be used as newborn reusable cloth nappies, covers for breast feeding, burp cloths, changing mat covers, newborn swaddles and baby comforters MuslinZ Reusable Cloth Nappy Bundle, Size 1 Swaddles XL 100x90cms 100% Cotton (2 Pack) (Woodland) Newborn Bibs (Taupe) Add To Basket Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.4 out of 5 stars 13 4.9 out of 5 stars 14 3.8 out of 5 stars 77 Price £21.00 £ 21 . 00 £12.99 £ 12 . 99 £10.99 £ 10 . 99 Machine Washable ✓ ✓ ✓
